Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class NetworkBranding

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.MetadataWithContent
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.NetworkBranding
public class NetworkBranding extends MetadataWithContent

Java class for NetworkBranding complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="NetworkBranding">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}MetadataWithContent">
       <sequence>
         <element name="loginBackgroundImageUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="loginFooterText" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="loginLogo" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="loginLogoName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="loginPrimaryColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="loginQuaternaryColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="loginRightFrameUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="network" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="pageFooter" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="pageHeader" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="primaryColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="primaryComplementColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="quaternaryColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="quaternaryComplementColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="secondaryColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="staticLogoImageUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="tertiaryColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="tertiaryComplementColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="zeronaryColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="zeronaryComplementColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
